- [ ] PR created and properly formatted
- [ ] Awaiting human review

## 🔍 Audit Checklist

**Before Each Push:**
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes
- [ ] `npm audit` shows no high/critical vulnerabilities
- [ ] All commits follow conventional format
- [ ] Feature branch created from `main`
- [ ] No commits to `main` directly

**Before Creating PR:**
- [ ] README updated (if needed)
- [ ] Documentation updated
- [ ] CHANGELOG updated
- [ ] `.github/TODO.md` updated
- [ ] `.github/PLANNING.md` updated
- [ ] PR template filled completely

**Before Merge:**
- [ ] All CI/CD checks green
- [ ] Code review approval obtained
- [ ] Test completion protocol followed
- [ ] No merge conflicts
- [ ] All phases documented in `.github/PLANNING.md`

---

## 📝 Notes

### Important Reminders
- Always create feature branches: `type/issue-number`
- Never commit directly to `main`
- Update this file after each phase
- Use timestamps for all entries
- Reference issue numbers in commits
